name: forge-gamepanel
description: Forge Control Plane — game server orchestration platform.

scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @forge/shared-types run build && npm --workspace @forge/sdk run build && npm --workspace @forge/ui run build
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @forge/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @forge/web run typecheck
